reviewer_sources.query: Go to https://www.goodhousekeeping.com/beauty-products/g26974590/best-deodorants-for-women/ and extract every deodorant and antiperspirant they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, type (deodorant vs antiperspirant), aluminum-free status, scent, key ingredients, pros with specific test results, cons.

Go to https://www.verywellfit.com/best-deodorants-for-men-8752482 and extract every deodorant they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, type (deodorant vs antiperspirant), aluminum-free status, scent, key ingredients, pros with specifics, cons.

Go to https://www.byrdie.com/best-deodorants-for-men-5070859 and extract every deodorant they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, type, scent, key ingredients, pros with specifics, cons.

Go to https://www.prevention.com/beauty/skin-care/g30764562/best-natural-deodorant/ and extract every natural deodorant they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their award or category, price, key ingredients, scent options, dermatologist notes, pros with specifics, cons.

Go to https://www.independent.co.uk/life-style/best-womens-deodorants-b2803741.html and extract every deodorant they recommend. For each product get: full product name, their ranking or award, price, type, scent, performance in heat, pros with specifics, cons.
